reading.title: Reading: Finding your way
reading.passage: Go straight along this street, then turn left at the corner. The library is the big building on your right. Those shops next to it are open until 9 p.m. The station is not far from here.

questions.question: The library is on the right.
questions.explanation: "The library is the big building on your right."

questions.question: The station is very far away.
questions.explanation: "The station is not far from here."

reading.title: Reading: Review — Mai's hometown
reading.passage: Hi, I'm Mai. I am from a small town. There is a small house near my hometown with a beautiful garden. My family isn't big, but we are happy. There is a park opposite the supermarket, and the school is between the bank and the post office.

questions.question: The park is opposite the supermarket.
questions.explanation: Câu cuối nêu rõ điều này.

questions.question: Where is the school?
options: Between the bank and the post office
questions.correct: Between the bank and the post office
questions.explanation: "the school is between the bank and the post office".
